  FreeBSD doc repository

  Modified files:

  Log:
  PR:     www/150924
  
  Modify the entry for Anthemion Software Ltd.  They develop
  
  - Jutoh (an ebook creator/editor)
  - DialogBlocks (a wxWidgets development platform)
  
  As a company can only be listed once I have merged both entries into one.
  
  Requested by:   Dr Julian Smart (julian att anthemion dott co dott uk)
  
  Committed during BSD Day 2010 in Budapest/Hungary.  :)
